allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const vulns=j.vulnerabilities; const nextV=vulns['next']; console.log\('next version:', require\('./apps/web/node_modules/next/package.json'\).version\); const high=Object.entries\(vulns\).filter\(\([,v]\)=>v.severity==='high'||v.severity==='critical'\); console.log\('high/critical:', high.map\(\([k]\)=>k\).slice\(0,10\)\)")
